headings.usage: H1, H2, H3, large display numbers, logo text

layout_and_spacing.philosophy: Generous spacing, architectural precision. High contrast and luxury feel.
layout_and_spacing.grid_modes: Bento Grid (Asymmetric) for Format/Events. Strict vertical timeline view for Michaelmas term.
rules: No generic equal columns for content sections. Use grid-cols-1 md:grid-cols-12 and span elements asymmetrically.
Never center align everything; build tension through asymmetry.
Containers with borders must have internal padding.
Hero image must have bg-black/60 or bg-gradient overlay to ensure text contrast.

surfaces.cards: Glassmorphism for event cards (bg-white/5 backdrop-blur-xl border border-white/10) or solid surface (bg-neutral-900) with 1px border. No soft shadows, use 1px inner highlights.
surfaces.buttons: Flat solid primary (#7A1C28) with #F8F8F8 text. Hover: lighter hue (#9A2332). Secondary buttons: Gold outline (#D4AF37) with transparent bg.

animations.hover: Subtle scale up (scale-105) for event images, slight background lighten for cards.
animations.scroll: Fade in and slide up for sections on scroll.

sections.name: Navigation
sections.description: Sticky Glassmorphism Header. Logo (Refined typographic wordmark), Links (Overview, Format, Timeline, Events, Partners). Right CTA (RSVP).

sections.name: Hero
sections.description: Full height. Large title 'The Oxford Card Room'. Overline 'MICHAELMAS 2027'. Tagline 'Oxford\'s premier poker and betting society'. RSVP CTA. Background uses hero_background with heavy dark overlay.

sections.name: Overview & About
sections.description: Asymmetric text block vs image block. Uses oxford_architecture image. 'An exclusive student-led forum bringing high-stakes luxury to the Oxford community.'

sections.name: Format & Rules
sections.description: Grid of rules. Texas Hold'em tournament structure, blinds, buy-ins, etiquette.

sections.name: Timeline (Michaelmas 2027)
sections.description: 8-week Oxford term visual timeline. A vertical line with nodes for each week (Week 1 to Week 8), highlighting big events.

sections.name: Upcoming Events
sections.description: Grid of 3 cards using provided images: Boxing Night with Betting, Regular Poker Nights, Educational Lectures.

sections.name: Partners
sections.description: Prominent showcase for Confirmed Sponsor: Jump Trading. Minimalist, premium logo display.

sections.name: Committee
sections.description: 2 minimalist Cards: President (Mirsaid Abdullaev) and Secretary (Atel Rassoli).

sections.name: Newsletter & Footer
sections.description: Newsletter signup form (input + button). Clean footer with society links and copyright.

components_strategy.ui_library: shadcn/ui customized (Input, Button, Form). Use raw HTML/Tailwind for bento grids.
components_strategy.forms: Use customized shadcn components. Ensure dark mode styles.
components_strategy.icons: lucide-react (use thin variants for luxury feel, strokeWidth={1.5}).

hero_background.description: Cinematic close-up of premium casino poker chips and cards

poker_regular.description: Premium playing cards fanned out on a table

boxing_event.description: Moody cinematic shot of a vintage boxing ring corner

instructions_to_main_agent: Strictly adhere to the dark theme and jewel/luxury archetype. Do not introduce generic blue/purple gradients.
Ensure all fonts are loaded. Use 'Cormorant Garamond' for display/headings and 'Outfit' for sans-serif body.
Use raw HTML and Tailwind CSS for the bento grids (Events, Format), not heavily structured Shadcn containers.
Implement the 8-week timeline vertically, mapping weeks 1 to 8 of Michaelmas 2027.
Sponsor section must prominently feature Jump Trading.
Use data-testid attributes for buttons, inputs, links, and forms.
Do NOT use placeholder text for images; use the provided image URLs.
Provide interactive RSVP forms and Newsletter inputs using Shadcn UI.
Implement smooth scrolling and glassmorphism elements over dark backgrounds where appropriate (like nav bar).
